_note: Manual overrides for GA Congress trade data, applied after generate_ga_congress_trades.py fetches from kadoa-org/congress-trading-monitor. Keys are filer IDs from that dataset. Use _exclude to drop a filer entirely, _mergeInto to fold one filer's trades into another (dedup), and any other fields to patch filer-level values.

house_richarddeandr_mccormick._note: Source dataset incorrectly shows NY-01. McCormick represents GA-07. Photo URL was a 404 — corrected to Congress.gov.

house_michaela_collins_jr._note: Duplicate entry for Michael Collins (GA-10). Merge trades into the primary entry.

house_michaela_collins._note: Michael Collins represents GA-10, not GA-08 as shown in source data. Photo URL was a 404 — corrected to Congress.gov.

house_tomthomas_graves_jr._note: Tom Graves left Congress January 3, 2021. No longer a current member.
